title: Phuket、Phuket — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Phuket、Phuket的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Phuket是Phuket的一個城市，人口約600,000。Thailand’s largest island offers stunning beaches, world-class diving, a vibrant expat community, and a tropical lifestyle at a fraction of comparable island destinations.
